title: Kenyan Beef Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew inspired by the cuisine of Kenya, featuring tender beef and a rich, savory broth.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the broth, pungent, salt, and pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Add the tomato and water (if using) and continue to simmer for another 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
Serve over rice, noodles, or with some crusty bread.
